name: Sarah Nkosi
bio: Specialist in sports rehabilitation and running injuries. Works with trail runners and cyclists at UCT Sports Science Institute.
qualifications: MSc Sports Physiotherapy (UCT), BSc Physiotherapy (UCT), HPCSA Registered

name: James van der Berg
bio: Musculoskeletal rehabilitation and return-to-sport assessment. Works with football and rugby club players across Gauteng.
qualifications: BSc Physiotherapy (Wits), HPCSA Registered, Dry Needling Certified

name: Priya Govender
bio: Specialist in post-surgical rehabilitation and chronic pain management. Experienced with ACL reconstruction and shoulder surgery recovery.
qualifications: MSc Physiotherapy (UKZN), Dry Needling Certified, HPCSA Registered

name: Michael Botha
bio: Sports physiotherapist working with club and provincial athletes. Offers running gait analysis and biomechanics assessment.
qualifications: BSc Physiotherapy (UP), Sports Physio Certification, HPCSA Registered

name: Thandi Dlamini
bio: Exercise therapy specialist in post-rehabilitation conditioning and chronic disease management. Partners with local physios for seamless recovery.
qualifications: BSc Human Movement Studies (SU), BioKin Registration (HPCSA)

name: Ruan Nel
bio: Functional movement screening and corrective exercise programming. Works with gym and clinical populations including office workers.
qualifications: BSc Biokinetics (Wits), FMS Certified, HPCSA Registered

name: Ayanda Zulu
bio: Exercise therapy for post-surgery recovery and chronic musculoskeletal conditions. Special interest in knee and hip rehabilitation.
qualifications: BSc Human Movement Sciences (UKZN), HPCSA Registered

name: Lisa Jacobs
bio: Specialises in cardiac rehabilitation and return-to-sport following lower limb injuries. Works in both private and hospital settings.
qualifications: BSc Biokinetics (UP), Cardiac Rehab Certified, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Mark Olivier
bio: MBChB with fellowship in sport and exercise medicine. Treats elite and recreational athletes. Western Province rugby team doctor.
qualifications: MBChB (UCT), MMed Sports Medicine, FACSM, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Siphiwe Mahlangu
bio: Sports injury assessment, concussion management, and return-to-sport protocols. Consultant to several Gauteng sports academies.
qualifications: MBChB (Wits), Diploma Sports Medicine, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Fatima Cassim
bio: Female athlete health, hormonal considerations in sport, and musculoskeletal medicine. Special interest in RED-S and stress fractures.
qualifications: MBChB (UKZN), MSc Sports Medicine, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Werner Steyn
bio: Overtraining syndrome, training load management, and sports injury second opinions. Consults to Loftus Versfeld sports medicine team.
qualifications: MBChB (UP), Diploma Exercise Medicine, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Lerato Molefe
bio: General practice with a strong interest in lifestyle medicine and preventive health for active adults. Medical aid and cash patients welcome.
qualifications: MBChB (UCT), FCGP, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Andrew Khumalo
bio: Comprehensive primary care for athletes and active adults. Telehealth appointments available for follow-ups and non-urgent concerns.
qualifications: MBChB (Wits), MFGP, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Samantha Pillay
bio: Holistic primary care with mental health support and lifestyle counselling. Comfortable discussing training-related health concerns.
qualifications: MBChB (UKZN), Family Medicine, HPCSA Registered

name: Dr. Johan Louw
bio: Experienced family physician managing chronic conditions and coordinating specialist referrals. Trusted by Pretoria East running community.
qualifications: MBChB (UP), FCFP, HPCSA Registered

name: Nomsa Sithole
bio: Sports nutrition for endurance athletes. Gut health and race-day fuelling strategy specialist. Works with Comrades and Two Oceans runners.
qualifications: BSc Dietetics (UCT), MSc Sports Nutrition, ADSA Registered

name: Claudia Ferreira
bio: Body composition management and performance nutrition. Works with team sport and individual athletes across multiple academies.
qualifications: BSc Dietetics (Wits), ADSA Registered

name: Keanu Reddy
bio: Plant-based performance nutrition and gut microbiome specialist. Helps athletes optimise digestion and reduce GI issues during training.
qualifications: BSc Dietetics (UKZN), Plant-Based Nutrition Certified, ADSA Registered

name: Bianca Meyer
bio: Recovery nutrition and periodised eating for strength and endurance sport. Evidence-based approach tailored to training phase.
qualifications: BSc Dietetics (UP), Sports Nutrition Diploma, ADSA Registered

name: Kyle Hendricks
bio: NSCA-certified strength and conditioning coach specialising in injury prevention and athletic performance. Works with club and provincial athletes.
qualifications: BSc Sport Science (UCT), CSCS (NSCA), SSCS

name: Sipho Ndaba
bio: Olympic lifting and powerlifting coaching with periodisation for competitive and recreational athletes. Online programming available.
qualifications: BSc Exercise Science (Wits), CSCS Certified

name: Danielle Coetzee
bio: Injury-informed strength training in collaboration with physiotherapists for safe return to lifting. Specialises in post-injury gym programming.
qualifications: BSc Human Movement (UKZN), NSCA-CPT

name: Francois du Plessis
bio: Strength programming for masters athletes (40+) and corporate wellness. Individual and small group coaching with performance testing.
qualifications: BSc Sport Science (UP), CSCS Certified

name: Emma van Wyk
bio: Online and in-person run coaching for 5km to ultra-marathon. Injury history assessment included in all new athlete plans.
qualifications: BSc Sport Science (SU), IAAF Level 2 Athletics Coach

name: Nhlanhla Mthembu
bio: Road and trail running coach. Comrades Marathon and Two Oceans preparation specialist with over 200 athletes coached.
qualifications: IAAF Level 1 Coach, Athletics SA Registered Coach

name: Chanel Dlamini
bio: Beginner to intermediate runner development including running technique analysis and personalised training plans. Very patient and approachable.
qualifications: BSc Sport Science (UKZN), RunSmart Certified

name: David van Rensburg
bio: Biomechanics-informed running coaching with GPS and lab-based performance testing. Works with sub-elite and masters runners.
qualifications: BSc Biokinetics (UP), IAAF Level 2 Coach
